description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The exterior features large glass windows, a mix of light-colored walls, and landscaped greenery, including palm trees and hedges. The house includes an attached garage, a driveway, and a backyard with a swimming pool. The open-plan interior is visible, showing multiple rooms, including a living area, kitchen, and bedrooms. The property is bordered by low walls and fencing, providing privacy while maintaining an open, airy feel. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, natural light, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage entrance, main entryway, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial backyard with pool and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, large glass windows, and open living spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, main entry, and a clear look into the open-plan interior.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, no porch, flush with the facade, and minimal decorative elements.
